home.hero_headline: A knowledge hub helping pharmaceutical regulatory professionals strengthen ANDA/CTD submission quality and reduce preventable FDA review delays.
home.hero_subhead: Practical, applicant-side guidance — checklists, articles, and a monthly brief — for the RA, CMC, and QA professionals who own submission quality.

about.intro: Submission-Quality Knowledge Hub is an independent professional-development initiative led by Sumiya Mushtaq, PharmD, MBA, sharing applicant-side submission-quality expertise with the wider regulatory community.

resources.intro: Free, practical guides and checklists for strengthening ANDA/CTD submissions. Each one targets a recurring, preventable cause of FDA review delay — written from the applicant's side of the desk.

newsletter.intro: The Submission-Quality Brief is a monthly, roughly five-minute read: notable FDA generic-drug developments plus one practical, applicable tip you can use on your next submission.
